title: cyclosorus augescens
intro: Cyclosorus augescens, also known as Augescens fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae, native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus augescens include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused in oil for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
